title: Silky Nostalgic Japanese Italian Fennel Sausage Stir-fry
description: A smoky and silky dish featuring Japanese-inspired flavors with Italian fennel sausages marinated for added depth and texture, perfect as a low-sodium-friendly meal.
instructions: Marinate Italian Fennel Sausages in a mixture of soy sauce, sesame oil, mirin, ginger paste, and vegetable stock powder for at least 30 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves and shallots and sauté until translucent.
Add Bok Choy and sliced red bell peppers to the pan and continue cooking for about 5-7 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Fold in marinated Italian Fennel Sausages, continuing to stir-fry for another minute or two, ensuring all pieces are coated with the sauce and spices.
Add green onions on top of the dish before serving as a garnish.
